name: all-mail
description: all-Mail Docker-first runtime with compatibility CLI scripts

scripts.docker:restart: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh docker compose down && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh docker compose up -d --build
scripts.install:all: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server install && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web install --legacy-peer-deps && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix cloudflare/workers/allmail-edge install
scripts.build:server: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run db:generate && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run build
scripts.build:web: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web run build && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh node scripts/prepare-public.mjs
scripts.build: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run db:generate && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run build && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web run build && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh node scripts/prepare-public.mjs
scripts.deploy:npm: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run db:generate && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run build && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web run build && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh node scripts/prepare-public.mjs && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh node scripts/start-all-mail.mjs
scripts.lint: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run lint && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web run lint
scripts.test: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh node --test scripts/*.test.mjs && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run test && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web run test
scripts.verify:release: ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run lint && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web run lint && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh node --test scripts/*.test.mjs && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run test && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web run test && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run db:generate && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix server run build && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix web run build && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh node scripts/prepare-public.mjs && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm --prefix cloudflare/workers/allmail-edge run check && ./scripts/sanitize-runtime-env.sh npm run audit:prod
